name: redline

customCommands.name: diff
customCommands.prompt: Run redline diff on the two trace files I specify. Explain the fork point in plain English, whether it represents a behavioral regression, and what likely caused it (prompt change, model upgrade, tool order change). Files: {input}
customCommands.description: Diff two redline trace files and explain any fork

customCommands.name: add-adapter
customCommands.prompt: Scaffold a new redline instrumentation adapter for the framework: {input}. Follow the pattern in src/redline/instrument.py. Create the adapter file, export it from __init__.py, and write at least 3 tests.
customCommands.description: Scaffold a new framework instrumentation adapter

rules: This is redline — a semantic diff engine for AI agent traces.
All embeddings must go through _get_model() in embed.py. Never import SentenceTransformer directly.
TraceNode.id is content-addressed (SHA-256). Never assign it manually.
Library code must not use print() — use rich.console.Console.
All public API must have type annotations and docstrings.
fork_threshold=0.70 and match_threshold=0.85 are the algorithmic defaults — don't change without tests.
